title: laurus keule
intro: Laurus keule, also known as bay laurel, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Laurus keule include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Laurus keule include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
